the luminaries making the native a spiritual luminary instead

b) The 9'1'> house is occupied by exalted Saturn aspected by a
trinatly pfaced Jupiter. Note that Jupiter is the 2114 lord while
the 2114 house is occupied by the 91ttlord venus in exaltation.
Simultaneously Jupiter aspects the Moon and the ascendant.
These influences give a person Ttikarana Suddhi bringing
the spheres of mind (Moon) speech Uu pitet) and Karma
(Saturn) to a united state.
c) Scorpio is aspected by Ketu while Mars aspects Cancer: Thus.
two occult signs get intensified.
d) Atma Kataka as per jaimini school of thought is Rahu in this
case.
